texto: He had the tendency, unfortunate for a new member of the committee, to like if not the rich themselves, at least their activities and surroundings, and to dislike the poor; a woman in rags toting a baby, barefoot children, made him feel sadistic rather than compassionate.His socialism, then, had the impatience and unfriendliness of a fashionable doctor forced to attend a tramp run over in the street.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hans Koningsberger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “He had the tendency, unfortunate for a new member of the committee, to like if not the rich thems…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, irony, poor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e poor.
